sections.paragraph:
Τίβερις, εως or ιδος, ὁ acc. Τίβεριν (Polyb. 6, 55, 1; Strabo et al.; Just., A I, 26, 2 ἐν τῷ Τίβερι ποταμῷ SibOr 5, 170) the Tiber river Hv 1, 1, 2.—Kl. Pauly V 813f.

acc. acc. = accusative

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1003
